name: University of Belgrade - Faculty of Medicine
notes: English-taught MD with €8,000 annual tuition and €140 application fee; entrance exams run locally (https://studiesinenglish.med.bg.ac.rs/studies-in-english/fees)

name: University of Niš - Faculty of Medicine
notes: Six-year English MD priced at €6,000 per year with a €50 application fee, keeping costs below most regional private options (https://www.medfak.ni.ac.rs/index.php/en/fees-en)

name: Aristotle University of Thessaloniki - English MD
notes: English-language MD limits intake to 60 seats and charges €12,000 per year in two instalments, requiring B2 English proof (https://aristotlemedical.edu.gr/index.php/admission-fees)

name: Semmelweis University (Hungary)
notes: General Medicine tuition is USD 9,950 per semester for 2025 entrants, alongside entrance exams covering biology, chemistry and English (https://semmelweis.hu/registrar/faq/how-much-is-the-tuition-fee-per-semester/)

name: European University Cyprus - School of Medicine
notes: Applicants confirm enrollment with an €11,500 down payment toward the €23,000 annual MD tuition and interview-driven admissions (https://euc.ac.cy/en/admissions/how-to-apply/medical/)

name: University of Twente - Technical Computer Science
notes: English-taught BSc lists €2,601 statutory tuition for EU/EEA students and €13,000 for non-EU students in 2025-26 (https://www.utwente.nl/en/education/bachelor/programmes/technical-computer-science/enrolment/tuition-fees/)

name: Eindhoven University of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering
notes: Program advertises €2,601 statutory tuition and €18,000 institutional tuition for 2025-26 cohorts (https://www.studyinnl.org/dutch-education/studies/computer-science-and-engineering-840-eindhoven-university-of-technology)

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam - Computer Science
notes: VU lists €2,601 tuition for EU/EEA students and €19,110 for non-EU applicants with a 15 January deadline (https://www.studyinnl.org/dutch-education/studies/computer-science-1209-vrije-universiteit-amsterdam)

name: Czech Technical University in Prague - Open Informatics
notes: Full-time English BSc charges CZK 128,000 (~€5,125) per academic year with AI, cybersecurity and HCI tracks (https://studyatctu.com/programme/open-informatics/)

name: Budapest University of Technology and Economics - Computer Science Engineering
notes: BME publishes €3,200 per semester tuition for non-EU computer science engineering students (https://xplore.bme.hu/tuition-fees/)

name: American University in Bulgaria
notes: Tuition for 2025-26 is €6,700 per semester plus €320 activity fee, with 93% of BA students receiving aid (https://www.aubg.edu/bg/%D0%BF%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%B5%D0%BC/%D0%B1%D0%B0%D0%BA%D0%B0%D0%BB%D0%B0%D0%B2%D1%8A%D1%80/%D1%82%D0%B0%D0%BA%D1%81%D0%B8-%D0%BF%D0%BE%D0%B4%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B5%D0%BF%D0%B0/)

name: Singidunum University
notes: Local private university advertising €2,100 annual tuition for Serbian-language master tracks and tuition waivers for top-GPA students (https://pfb.singidunum.ac.rs/page/master-skolarine-i-tekuci-racuni)

name: Bocconi University - International Economics and Management
notes: BSc International Economics and Management tuition is €16,700 per year for 2025-26 entrants (https://ischoolconnect.com/blog/all-about-bocconi-universitys-fees-and-more/)

name: Rotterdam School of Management - BSc International Business Administration
notes: IBA charges €2,695 for EEA students and €14,000 for non-EEA students with a 15 January application deadline (https://www.rsm.nl/education/bachelor/bsc-international-business-administration-iba/)

name: Vienna University of Economics and Business - BSc Business and Economics
notes: Standard tuition is €363.36 per semester for EU/EEA students and €726.72 for non-EU students during the degree (https://www.educations.com/institutions/wu-vienna/bsc-in-business-and-economics)
